free_text: Investigation of stripping reactions on chromium
isotopes
English translation
The indicated experimental errors in the
angular distributions were obtained by averaging
several measurements, and include statistical errors
not greater than 3 percent,  errors of protongroup
resolution, errors associated with inaccurate angular
positioning, etc.  All these errors pertain to
measurements of the angular distributions in relative
units. The error in the absolute value of the
differential (d,p) cross section was 50 percent.
UkrNDC

diameter were enriched in the chromium isotope.
